name: Brave Search MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Brave (brave org) for Brave Search API. Enables AI agents to search the web, find local businesses, search images, and retrieve news using Brave's independent search index — not a wrapper around Google or Bing. Provides privacy-respecting search with Brave's own crawl data.
use_cases: Web search from research and information-retrieval agents
Finding local businesses and services from location-aware agents
News search and aggregation from content monitoring agents
Image search from creative and content agents
not_for: Teams needing real-time data beyond Brave's crawl freshness
Enterprise search over private documents (use internal search tools)
Agents needing Google-specific search features or Shopping
best_when: An AI agent needs independent web search with privacy-respecting results — not Google or Bing — and benefits from Brave's own search index including web, local, images, and news endpoints.
avoid_when: You specifically need Google results or real-time live data not yet in Brave's index. High-volume use requires a paid plan.

auth.notes: Brave Search API key required. Free tier available at brave.com/search/api/. Key passed as environment variable.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro and higher plans for more queries
pricing.notes: Free API key available — no credit card required for basic tier. MCP server is free open source from Brave's official org.

performance.rate_limits: 2,000 free queries/month; paid plans for higher volume

known_agent_gotchas: Free tier 2,000 queries/month is quickly exhausted by active agents — monitor usage
Local search results are US-centric — may have limited coverage in other regions
Brave's index is independent — some niche or very recent content may lag Google
Official from Brave's org — quality implementation from the browser/search company
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to Brave Search API. API key in environment variable. Brave's privacy-first approach means no search query logging beyond rate limiting.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS only. API key authentication. Brave privacy policy — no user tracking. Official implementation.
